items.name: siddharthvaddem/openscreen
items.description: Create stunning demos for free. Open-source, no subscriptions, no watermarks, and free for commercial use. An alternative to Screen Studio.

items.name: Yeachan-Heo/oh-my-codex
items.description: OmX - Oh My codeX: Your codex is not alone. Add hooks, agent teams, HUDs, and so much more.

items.name: asgeirtj/system_prompts_leaks
items.description: Extracted system prompts from ChatGPT (GPT-5.4, GPT-5.3, Codex), Claude (Opus 4.6, Sonnet 4.6, Claude Code), Gemini (3.1 Pro, 3 Flash, CLI), Grok (4.2, 4), Perplexity, and more. Updated regularly.

items.name: sherlock-project/sherlock
items.description: Hunt down social media accounts by username across social networks

items.name: msitarzewski/agency-agents
items.description: A complete AI agency at your fingertips - From frontend wizards to Reddit community ninjas, from whimsy injectors to reality checkers. Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables.

items.name: 666ghj/MiroFish
items.description: A Simple and Universal Swarm Intelligence Engine, Predicting Anything. 简洁通用的群体智能引擎，预测万物

items.name: NousResearch/hermes-agent
items.description: The agent that grows with you

items.name: bytedance/deer-flow
items.description: An open-source long-horizon SuperAgent harness that researches, codes, and creates. With the help of sandboxes, memories, tools, skill, subagents and message gateway, it handles different levels of tasks that could take minutes to hours.

items.name: lightpanda-io/browser
items.description: Lightpanda: the headless browser designed for AI and automation

items.name: shareAI-lab/learn-claude-code
items.description: Bash is all you need - A nano claude code–like 「agent harness」, built from 0 to 1

items.name: affaan-m/everything-claude-code
items.description: The agent harness performance optimization system. Skills, instincts, memory, security, and research-first development for Claude Code, Codex, Opencode, Cursor and beyond.

items.name: jarrodwatts/claude-hud
items.description: A Claude Code plugin that shows what's happening - context usage, active tools, running agents, and todo progress

items.name: mvanhorn/last30days-skill
items.description: AI agent skill that researches any topic across Reddit, X, YouTube, HN, Polymarket, and the web - then synthesizes a grounded summary

items.name: volcengine/OpenViking
items.description: OpenViking is an open-source context database designed specifically for AI Agents(such as openclaw). OpenViking unifies the management of context (memory, resources, and skills) that Agents need through a file system paradigm, enabling hierarchical context delivery and self-evolving.

items.name: obra/superpowers
items.description: An agentic skills framework & software development methodology that works.

items.name: langchain-ai/open-swe
items.description: An Open-Source Asynchronous Coding Agent

items.name: alirezarezvani/claude-skills
items.description: 220+ Claude Code skills & agent plugins for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and 8 more coding agents — engineering, marketing, product, compliance, C-level advisory.

items.name: TauricResearch/TradingAgents
items.description: TradingAgents: Multi-Agents LLM Financial Trading Framework

items.name: anthropics/claude-code
items.description: Claude Code is an agentic coding tool that lives in your terminal, understands your codebase, and helps you code faster by executing routine tasks, explaining complex code, and handling git workflows - all through natural language commands.

items.name: promptfoo/promptfoo
items.description: Test your prompts, agents, and RAGs. Red teaming/pentesting/vulnerability scanning for AI. Compare performance of GPT, Claude, Gemini, Llama, and more. Simple declarative configs with command line and CI/CD integration. Used by OpenAI and Anthropic.

items.name: microsoft/BitNet
items.description: Official inference framework for 1-bit LLMs

items.name: langchain-ai/deepagents
items.description: Agent harness built with LangChain and LangGraph. Equipped with a planning tool, a filesystem backend, and the ability to spawn subagents - well-equipped to handle complex agentic tasks.
